title: neotorularia runcinata
intro: Neotorularia runcinata, also known as Prickly Cystiscus, is a plant species in the Brassicaceae family, native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neotorularia runcinata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Neotorularia runcinata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
